prestazioni: Engine swap to a **K14C Boosterjet** (1.4L turbo, 140 PS stock) with a **Garrett GT2259S turbocharger** (hybrid core, 0.63 A/R turbine housing) for 220+ PS on E85 fuel, paired with a **HKS Hi-Power exhaust manifold** (4-2-1 design) and **Toda Racing forged pistons** (8.5:1 compression for boost resilience).

Full **Motec M150 ECU** standalone management with **AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor** (30-0300) for closed-loop E85 tuning, **Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors**, and **Walbro 450 LPH fuel pump** (F90000267) to support 300+ HP targets.

**KW Suspension Clubsport coilovers** (3-way adjustable, 80mm strut bodies) with **SuperPro poly bushings** (front control arms, rear subframe) and **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar** (24mm, 3-position) to eliminate body roll on 235/40R18 **Yokohama Advan Sport A/S+ tires** on **Enkei PF05 wheels** (18x8, +35 offset).
estetica: **Seibon Carbon fiber hood** (SX4 S-Cross-specific, 30% weight reduction) with **VIS Racing front bumper** (aggressive splitter, integrated tow hooks) and **Rocket Bunny-style overfenders** (custom-fabricated for 20mm wider track).

**DRLs replaced with Osram LED bars** (6000K, CRI 90+) in **Morimoto XB LED headlight housings** (projector retrofit, HID-compatible) and **custom rear diffuser** (3D-printed ABS, integrated **Akrapović titanium exhaust tips**).

**Full interior carbon fiber trim** (dashboard, door cards) by **AutoStyle Japan**, **Recaro Sportster CS seats** (Sparco sliders, 6-point harnesses) and **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel** (350mm, suede grip) with **NRG quick-release hub**.
